name: HD 101767

name: HD 75426
spectral_type: F5IV/V (modern parameters indicate dwarf: Gaia logg=4.12 TIC lumclass=DWARF)
archival_rv_summary: Gaia DR3 rv_amplitude_robust = 1.92 km/s across 27 transits; 4 independent astrometric witnesses (HGCA 33-sigma + Kervella PMa 27-sigma + NSS Acceleration 60-sigma + Tycho-Gaia 25-yr DeltaPM 4.41-sigma) all consistent with single P~125yr companion
notes: orvara joint HGCA + synthetic K_RV constraint posterior median 282 MJ (early M-dwarf regime) but 2-sigma low tail 100 MJ still includes substellar; never observed by any ESO public spectrograph; single CORALIE/FEROS epoch decisive
